expectations.text: prism-locator agent is used to check for existing research
Document includes file:line references to SKILL.md files
expectations.evidence: Prism uses a convention-based skill discovery system built on Claude Code's native plugin architecture. Each skill is a `SKILL.md` file inside `skills/<name>/` with YAML frontmatter containing `name`,

expectations.text: codebase-locator agent is spawned to find skill files
Research template sections are all present (Summary, Files Discovered, etc.)
TodoWrite is used to track open questions if any arise
